---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-18"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)


library(readr)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(skimr)
library(cowplot)
```



```{r help data}

site1 <- st_read('./data/mining_site1.shp')


library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)

mongolia <- ne_countries(country = "Mongolia", scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
mongolia_wgs <- st_transform(mongolia, 4326)   # ensure WGS84 for leaflet

```


  The data is very large and may take a while
  
```{r}

f <- file.path('data', 'cas', 'water_consumption_with_uncertainty.csv')
dd <- readr::read_csv(file = f, show_col_types = F) %>% 
  rename_with(tolower)

mining_sf <- dd %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326, remove = F)   # WGS84

f <- "./data/water_consumption_cas.gpkg"
st_write(mining_sf, f, layer = "water_consumption", delete_layer = TRUE)
```


```{r map}

library(leaflet)

## reload data
f <- "./data/water_consumption_cas.gpkg"
pt.plant <- st_read(f)

# ---------------------------
# If starting from a data frame with lon/lat columns
# ---------------------------
leaflet() %>%
  # addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%    # clean basemap
  # addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldTopoMap) %>%    # clean basemap
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldImagery) %>%       # satellite
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.PositronNoLabels,    # road labels on top
                   options = providerTileOptions(opacity = 0.3)) %>%
  
  addPolygons(
    data        = mongolia_wgs,
    fill        = FALSE,
    color       = "white",
    weight      = 2,
    opacity     = 0.8
  ) %>%
  
  addPolygons(
    data        = site1,
    fill        = FALSE,
    color       = "yellow",
    weight      = 5,
    opacity     = 0.8
  ) %>%
  
  addCircleMarkers(
    data   = pt.plant,
    lng    = ~longitude,
    lat    = ~latitude,
    radius = 4,
    color  = "red",
    stroke = TRUE,
    fillOpacity = 0.5,
    popup  = ~paste0(
      "<b>Name:</b> ", mine_name, "<br>",
      "<b>Category:</b> ", commodity, "<br>",
      "<b>waterstress_moderate_2030:</b> ",  round(annual_water_consumption_mm3, 1), "<br>",
      "<b>waterstress_moderate_2050:</b> ",  round(water_intensity_m3_per_ton, 1)
    ),
    label = ~mine_name,           # hover tooltip
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      style     = list("font-weight" = "bold", padding = "4px 8px"),
      direction = "auto"
    )
  ) %>%
  addScaleBar(position = "bottomleft") %>%
  addMiniMap(toggleDisplay = TRUE, position = "bottomleft")  # inset overview map

# ---------------------------
# If starting from an sf object (auto-extracts coords)
# ---------------------------
# leaflet(pt.plant) %>%
#   addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
#   addCircleMarkers(
#     radius      = 4,
#     color       = "#2ecc71",
#     stroke      = FALSE,
#     fillOpacity = 0.7,
#     popup       = ~paste0("<b>Rank:</b> ", rank)
#   )


# ---------------------------
# Richer version: colour by a variable (e.g. rank)
# ---------------------------
# pal <- colorNumeric(palette = "YlOrRd", domain = pt.plant$rank)
# 
# leaflet(pt.plant) %>%
#   addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
#   addCircleMarkers(
#     lng         = ~lon,
#     lat         = ~lat,
#     radius      = 5,
#     color       = ~pal(rank),
#     stroke      = FALSE,
#     fillOpacity = 0.8,
#     popup       = ~paste0("<b>Rank:</b> ", rank)
#   ) %>%
#   addLegend(
#     position = "bottomright",
#     pal      = pal,
#     values   = ~rank,
#     title    = "Planting Priority"
#   ) %>%
#   addScaleBar(position = "bottomleft")
```
